creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text:
Hello,

Since the update to LXQt 2.0.0, Qt6 programs, including LXQt itself, don't follow the cursor theme set in the LXQt settings panel anymore (the default Xorg cursor theme is used instead). The correct theme is however used inside Qt5 and GTK applications.

I tested on Linux (openSUSE Tumbleweed) to compare and it works properly there.
